wf-design.name: wf-design
wf-design.fullDescription: Guides feature, bug, and request design from intake through readiness handoff, using current product status and project vision alignment. Use when work needs design framing, options, roadmap fit checks, or a clear handoff package before planning and execution.
triggers: a clear handoff package before planning and execution

wf-execute.name: wf-execute
wf-execute.fullDescription: Orchestrates execution workflow hygiene across GitHub issues, project fields, branch and PR linkage, progress reporting, and release-close carryover for the workflows repository. Use when work starts from an issue and needs consistent status transitions, field updates, and execution reporting through closure.
triggers: work starts from an issue and needs consistent status transitions

wf-plan.name: wf-plan
wf-plan.fullDescription: Orchestrates project-level planning, roadmap, and delivery-cadence workflows for the workflows repository by routing requests to the right specialist skills and enforcing commitment-vs-forecast clarity. Use when planning from vision, slicing releases, sequencing architectural runway, running roadmap/project cadence, or producing planning status reports.
